About Lore How to Play Tutorial Rules Card Gallery Deck Builder

Deck Construction

Deck Builder

Build a legal Super Benji TCG deck in Set/Card format, then export the same list by card name for easy sharing.

Rules-aware

Track cards by set and validate the list automatically

Card Catalog

Pick cards to add

Use the filter to browse a set, then click Add to push a copy into the deck list.

Current Deck

Amount x Set/Card

This is the source of truth. Each line should look like 2 x BS26/13.

Community

Join The Official Super Benji Discord

This is the official Discord server for the full Super Benji series, not only the trading card game. You'll find channels for the show, movies, and community updates.

It also has Super Benji TCG spaces where players share decks, ask rules questions, and talk about the game. Join now to talk with a community of other people who love the Super Benji TCG!
